## What & why
Briefly describe the change and the motivation. Link any related issue
(e.g. `Closes #123`).

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] `npm run test -w server` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck -w server` and `npm run typecheck -w web` pass
- [ ] `npm run build -w web` passes
- [ ] User-facing strings added to **both** locales (`es` + `en`)
- [ ] Any new displayed data is **enterable** (form) or **ingested** (integration) — not seed-only
- [ ] Docs updated where relevant (README / ARCHITECTURE / DETAIL / USER_MANUAL / API)
- [ ] RBAC respected for any new write operations

## Screenshots / notes
For UI changes, add before/after screenshots or a short note.
